message:
test(fcp-manifest): simplify embedded manifest test

Replace embed_manifest! macro test with simpler include_bytes! assertion.

The test now directly uses include_bytes! to load the manifest fixture
and compares against the filesystem version, eliminating the need for
a nested test module.

Also updates Cargo.lock to reflect current workspace dependencies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
